message:
test(proptest): add 41 property-based tests for runtime.rs + degradation.rs (ft-207ox)

Covers RuntimeMetrics counter accumulation, percentile ordering,
snapshot consistency, RuntimeConfig defaults, ResizeDegradationTier
rank monotonicity, evaluate_resize_degradation_ladder tier selection,
degradation warning_line content, and serde roundtrips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
